case_title: ROBERT TENG et al VS. PORFERIO EBORLAS et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT EBORLAS, CECIL (OWES COURT FEES) HEARING SET FOR MAY-15-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT EBORLAS, PORFERIO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENG, ROBERT KWONG, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EBORLAS, PORFERIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 546 MUNICH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94112 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, **APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENG, ROBERT KWONG, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT EBORLAS, PORFERIO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-15-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CECIL EBORLAS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
